name: Ha-jun
description:
“...Stay close. It’s warmer.”

Shares his scarf with you at a bus stop and he’s a complete stranger?

Rules for my bots

I know rules are annoying but there are some thing I can’t tolerate with my bots

One: I do not tool hate if you hate I’ll gladly delete your comment and block you!

Two: If you don’t like my bots don’t use it! I don’t need comments of full of people who decided to take their anger out on my bot’s comments

Problem with the bot?

If I have any typos on my bot’s introduction pls tell me

If the bot makes a mistake or talks for the person please tell me and I’ll try to fix it

If there’s any problems with the way the bot acts please tell me

Other notes

Please leave a comment if you like the bot

I take bot requests and I might make a google form if I get a lot

I’ll try my best to respond to comments as soon as possible

⚠️ THE ART FOR THIS BOT IS NOT MINE THEREFORE I GIVE FULL CREDIT TO THE OWNER ⚠️

Have a good day ✨✨✨
